bulletins.title: RRB NTPC UG Admit Card 2026 released for 13–20 June exam. Download from your regional RRB website now.
SSC CGL 2026 – Apply online before 22 June 2026. 12,256 vacancies for Group B & C posts. Fee payment last date: 23 June.
RRB NTPC UG Phase 2 CBT 1 Exam – Revised schedule: 13 to 20 June 2026. City intimation slip activated.
SSC CGL 2026 – New exam pattern: Sectional timing introduced in both Tier 1 & Tier 2. AAO paper added in Tier 2.
SSC CGL 2026 – Form correction window to open 29 June to 1 July 2026. Candidates can rectify application errors.
⚠️ ADVISORY: SSC warns against impersonation & malpractice. Strict legal action will be taken against offenders.
SSC Stenographer Grade C & D 2026 – Notification released. CBE tentatively scheduled for July–August 2026.
SSC CHSL 2026 – Notification expected shortly. Tier 1 exam scheduled July–September 2026. Class 12 pass eligible.
SSC CPO SI 2026 – Sub-Inspector in Delhi Police & CAPF notification released. Apply at ssc.gov.in.
RRB NTPC UG Phase 2 City Intimation Slip live for 13–20 June exam. Check exam city, date & shift details.
SSC MTS 2026 – Official notification to be released 30 June 2026. Exam expected September–November 2026.
SSC Selection Post Phase 14 – Notification released. Multiple graduate & non-graduate post vacancies open.
UGC NET June 2026 – Notification out. Registration active at ugcnet.nta.nic.in for Assistant Professor & JRF.
SSC JHT 2026 – Combined Hindi Translators Examination notification released. Apply at ssc.gov.in.
SSC JE 2026 – Junior Engineer exam notification released. Tier 1 CBE scheduled May–June 2026.
RRB Group D 2026 – Notification expected October 2026 as per RRB Exam Calendar 2026–27.
RRB JE 2026 – Notification expected July 2026. Vacancies for Junior Engineer, DMS & CMA posts.
RRB NTPC 2026 – Total 8,868 vacancies: 5,810 graduate level + 3,058 undergraduate level posts across all zones.
SSC Exam Calendar 2026–27 released. Download PDF from ssc.gov.in for all notification & exam dates.
SSC CGL Tier 1 2026 – Exam tentatively scheduled August–September 2026. Tier 2 expected December 2026.
